About Sorro

One operating system for the business behind creative work.

Sorro is built for the part of creativity nobody sees: the planning, approvals, files, clients, schedules, invoices, reporting and people that keep ambitious work moving.

Explore the product → Meet the founder
Sorro OS
ProjectsStudio ReviewStorageClientsInvoicesReports
01Not another app

A connected workspace for the whole operation.

02Built for context

Every file, note, task and approval stays attached.

03Powered by CSorro

A product shaped by real production pressure.

Why it exists

Creative teams are drowning in disconnected tools.

Most businesses do not fail because they lack software. They fail because the work is scattered across too many places and the context disappears between them.

Without Sorro

TrelloAsanaMondayClickUpDiscordSlackNotionGoogle DriveDropboxFrame.ioHubSpotXeroSheetsCalendarChatGPT
  • Multiple logins
  • Duplicate information
  • Buried decisions
  • Lost accountability
→

With Sorro

Projects, files, people, clients, reviews, invoices, reports and AI operate from one source of truth.

One loginOne workspaceOne operation

What Sorro brings together

The tools of a creative business, designed as one system.

▣

Projects

Plan work, track progress and keep delivery moving.

▶

Studio Review

Upload creative work, leave notes, approve and request changes.

▤

Storage

Files, folders, versions and assets connected to projects.

◎

People

Teams, roles, permissions and responsibilities in one place.

◈

CRM

Clients, contacts, pipelines and delivery history.

▥

Calendar

Meetings, deadlines, reviews and production schedules.

▧

Invoices

Turn approved work into payment without losing context.

⌁

Reports

See what happened, what moved and what needs attention.

✦

AI

Assistance that understands the workspace, not just a blank prompt.

The philosophy

Simple on the surface. Powerful underneath.

Sorro should feel calm enough for a creator to open every morning, but structured enough for a serious business to run through it. The complexity lives underneath: permissions, context, workflow history, review trails, client records, reports and intelligent assistance.

The workflow

From first brief to final archive.

BriefPlanAssignCreateReviewApproveInvoiceReportArchive

Mission

To empower creators by bringing people, projects and production together in one operating system.

Vision

To become the operating system behind the world's most successful creative projects.

Positioning

“If you're serious about creating, you're using Sorro.”

Built by CSorro

The founder story is separate for a reason.

This page explains Sorro as a product and company concept. Cristian Sorensen's production background, personal journey and work experience live on the Founder page.
